GuZhenRen:KongQiao_1.NAME: Rank 1 Aperture
GuZhenRen:KongQiao_1.FLAVOR: A Rank 1 Gu Master's aperture, produces green copper primeval essence.

GuZhenRen:KongQiao_2.NAME: Rank 2 Aperture
GuZhenRen:KongQiao_2.FLAVOR: A Rank 2 Gu Master's aperture, produces red steel primeval essence.
DESCRIPTIONS: The first Gu worm card below #yRank #y2 you play each combat costs 0.

GuZhenRen:KongQiao_3.NAME: Rank 3 Aperture
GuZhenRen:KongQiao_3.FLAVOR: A Rank 3 Gu Master's aperture, produces white silver primeval essence.
DESCRIPTIONS: The first Gu worm card below #yRank #y3 you play each combat costs 0.

GuZhenRen:KongQiao_4.NAME: Rank 4 Aperture
GuZhenRen:KongQiao_4.FLAVOR: A Rank 4 Gu Master's aperture, produces yellow gold primeval essence.
DESCRIPTIONS: The first Gu worm card below #yRank #y4 you play each combat costs 0.

GuZhenRen:KongQiao_5.NAME: Rank 5 Aperture
GuZhenRen:KongQiao_5.FLAVOR: A Rank 5 Gu Master's aperture, produces purple crystal primeval essence.
DESCRIPTIONS: The first Gu worm card below #yRank #y5 you play each combat costs 0.

GuZhenRen:XianQiao_6.NAME: Rank 6 Immortal Aperture
GuZhenRen:XianQiao_6.FLAVOR: A Rank 6 Gu Immortal's immortal aperture, produces green grape immortal essence.
DESCRIPTIONS: The first Gu worm card below #yRank #y6 you play each combat costs 0.

GuZhenRen:XianQiao_7.NAME: Rank 7 Immortal Aperture
GuZhenRen:XianQiao_7.FLAVOR: A Rank 7 Gu Immortal's immortal aperture, produces red date immortal essence.
DESCRIPTIONS: The first Gu worm card below #yRank #y7 you play each combat costs 0.

GuZhenRen:XianQiao_8.NAME: Rank 8 Immortal Aperture
GuZhenRen:XianQiao_8.FLAVOR: A Rank 8 Gu Immortal's immortal aperture, produces white litchi immortal essence.
DESCRIPTIONS: The first Gu worm card below #yRank #y8 you play each combat costs 0.

GuZhenRen:XianQiao_9.NAME: Rank 9 Immortal Aperture
GuZhenRen:XianQiao_9.FLAVOR: "Everyone, I want you to remember, I, Gu Yue Fang Yuan, am Great Love Immortal Venerable!"
DESCRIPTIONS: The first Gu worm card below #yRank #y9 you play each combat costs 0.

GuZhenRen:LiDaoDaoHen.NAME: Strength Path Dao Mark
GuZhenRen:LiDaoDaoHen.FLAVOR: Can increase the strength of a Gu Immortal.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of combat, gain #yStrength equal to your Dao mark stacks.

GuZhenRen:YanXinGu.NAME: Fire Heart Gu
GuZhenRen:YanXinGu.FLAVOR: Fire Heart Gu resides in the heart. It has the effect of strengthening fire-type Gu worms.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your turn, add 1 #yBlaze to your hand.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_AngryBird.NAME: Killer Move - Angry Bird
GuZhenRen:Recipe_AngryBird.FLAVOR: A vivid little fire bird containing massive destructive power.

GuZhenRen:DingXianYou.NAME: Fixed Immortal Travel
GuZhenRen:DingXianYou.FLAVOR: A legendary Space path Immortal Gu recorded in <The Legends of Ren Zu>. The world is vast, but there is nowhere it cannot go.
DESCRIPTIONS: When choosing the next room on the map, you can ignore the current path.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_WanXingFeiYing.NAME: Killer Move - Myriad Star Firefly
GuZhenRen:Recipe_WanXingFeiYing.FLAVOR: Once used, heaven and earth turn dim, night descends for a thousand li, and every thought of the Gu Immortal forms a star thought.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_YangMangBeiHuoYi.NAME: Killer Move - Yang Mang Wears Fire Cloak
GuZhenRen:Recipe_YangMangBeiHuoYi.FLAVOR: Igniting the hair to form a giant flaming cloak that protects the body, this is the profound culmination of Fire path.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_ZhuiMingHuo.NAME: Killer Move - Chasing Life Fire
GuZhenRen:Recipe_ZhuiMingHuo.FLAVOR: It senses attacks, traces the origin, and burns the immortal aperture directly. As long as life persists, this fire burns endlessly.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_XingXiuQiPan.NAME: Killer Move - Star Constellation Chessboard
GuZhenRen:Recipe_XingXiuQiPan.FLAVOR: The first Immortal Gu House in history, possessing the number one deduction capability in the world.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_WuZhiQuanXinJian.NAME: Killer Move - Five Finger Fist Heart Sword
GuZhenRen:Recipe_WuZhiQuanXinJian.FLAVOR: Having endured fifty-four tribulations, the tribulation clouds still cover the sky.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_JianLangSanDie.NAME: Killer Move - Triple Layered Sword Wave
GuZhenRen:Recipe_JianLangSanDie.FLAVOR: This move unleashes three waves of swords, each higher than the last. The surging sword waves possess astonishing lethal power.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_AnQiSha.NAME: Killer Move - Dark Assassination
GuZhenRen:Recipe_AnQiSha.FLAVOR: This move leaks no aura when activated. Once unleashed, the sword momentum is extremely fast, striking like sudden lightning.
DESCRIPTIONS: Sword Phantom Gu / Multiple Sword Phantom Gu / Overlapping Phantom Gu

GuZhenRen:Recipe_JianHenSuoMing.NAME: Killer Move - Sword Marks Claiming Life
GuZhenRen:Recipe_JianHenSuoMing.FLAVOR: Wounds caused by Flying Sword Immortal Gu carve Sword path dao marks on the target, which will automatically seek out and attack their weaknesses.

GuZhenRen:JianMei.NAME: Sword Eyebrows
GuZhenRen:JianMei.FLAVOR: Capable of carving Sword path dao marks into the eyebrows.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of each combat, gain 1 #ySword #yEdge .

GuZhenRen:Recipe_WanWo.NAME: Killer Move - Myriad Self
GuZhenRen:Recipe_WanWo.FLAVOR: All forms are but my own self.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_WanWoDaShouYin.NAME: Killer Move - Myriad Self Giant Hand
GuZhenRen:Recipe_WanWoDaShouYin.FLAVOR: The first style of Myriad Self, capable of condensing the strength of thousands into one.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_ShangFangJieWa.NAME: Killer Move - Tearing Off Roof Tiles
GuZhenRen:Recipe_ShangFangJieWa.FLAVOR: A Strength path killer move that heavily counters Immortal Gu Houses, easily breaching even their defensive methods.

GuZhenRen:XianGuCanHai.NAME: Immortal Gu Carcass
GuZhenRen:XianGuCanHai.FLAVOR: The remains left behind after an Immortal Gu is destroyed still retain some dao marks and can be used as Gu refinement material.
DESCRIPTIONS: Smithing at Rest Sites will not consume an action.
The effect of this Relic has been exhausted.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_XueJianLeng.NAME: Killer Move - Blood Turning Cold
GuZhenRen:Recipe_XueJianLeng.FLAVOR: With Cold Blood Immortal Gu as the core, it rapidly cools the enemy's blood until it freezes.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_XuePiaoLiu.NAME: Killer Move - Blood Drift
GuZhenRen:Recipe_XuePiaoLiu.FLAVOR: A long river of blood light carries the user through the air, scattering intense bloody odors wherever it goes.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_ZhuMoBang.NAME: Killer Move - Demon Judgment Board
GuZhenRen:Recipe_ZhuMoBang.FLAVOR: A Rank 8 Blood path Immortal Gu House created by Heavenly Court, recording the information of demonic path members across the five regions. It has almost no shortcomings.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_SanShiSanTianGuang.NAME: Killer Move - Thirty-Three Heavenly Lights
GuZhenRen:Recipe_SanShiSanTianGuang.FLAVOR: Using the Gu Immortal as the wick to radiate intense light. With every flicker, the power of the strong light increases.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_TianPuGuangHe.NAME: Killer Move - Heavenly Waterfall Light River
GuZhenRen:Recipe_TianPuGuangHe.FLAVOR: The river of light rolls and churns. Every drop of this monstrous light water is like a fragment of the sun, dazzling to the extreme.

GuZhenRen:HongYunQiTianGu.NAME: Fortune Rivaling Heaven Gu
GuZhenRen:HongYunQiTianGu.FLAVOR: The absolute pinnacle essence of all living beings' luck.
DESCRIPTIONS: The final #yProbability value of all your cards is doubled.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_WanWuDaTongBian.NAME: Killer Move - Myriad Beings Assimilation Transformation
GuZhenRen:Recipe_WanWuDaTongBian.FLAVOR: The supreme profoundness of Transformation path, capable of causing myriad paths to converge and all living beings to assimilate.
DESCRIPTIONS: Any Transformation Path or Strength Path Gu worm

GuZhenRen:Recipe_WuJinXuanGuangQi.NAME: Killer Move - Five Restrictions Profound Light Qi
GuZhenRen:Recipe_WuJinXuanGuangQi.FLAVOR: Five restrictions profound light dims heaven and earth, a rank eight killer move traps two venerables.

GuZhenRen:Recipe_GuangYinFeiRen.NAME: Killer Move - Flying Time Edge
GuZhenRen:Recipe_GuangYinFeiRen.FLAVOR: "Once this blade is unleashed, it never misses, it hits without fail, and those hit will surely die."

GuZhenRen:Recipe_SongYouFeng.NAME: Killer Move - Farewell Friend Wind
GuZhenRen:Recipe_SongYouFeng.FLAVOR: "We hit it off from the start, but now you are leaving. Since we are parting, my good friend, let me send you off."
DESCRIPTIONS: Any Wind Path or Rule Path Gu worm

GuZhenRen:ChunQiuChan.NAME: Spring and Autumn Cicada
GuZhenRen:ChunQiuChan.FLAVOR: The cold wind blows in the valley of the fallen, the spring and autumn cicada sings the return of the youth ......
DESCRIPTIONS: Rewind time to the current floor at death, can only be used once per floor, and increases battle experience by 1 point.
